# Suvatsalya Child Growth and Development Centre

> Suvatsalya is a Noida-based multidisciplinary child development centre providing evidence-based therapies and individualised educational programs for children with developmental delays and disorders.

## About

Suvatsalya Child Growth and Development Centre is a nurturing space dedicated to the holistic development of every child. Founded with the vision to bridge compassion and understanding in child care, the centre provides individualised support that helps children learn, grow, and thrive at their own pace.

Our multidisciplinary team of developmental paediatricians, paediatric neurologist, paediatric ophthalmologist, paediatric orthopaedician, paediatric ENT specialist, clinical psychologists, special educators, occupational and speech therapists works collaboratively to address developmental, behavioural, emotional, and learning needs.

## Location

Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

## Contact

- Phone: +91-8400015666
- Timings: All days 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM (prior appointment is mandatory)
- Website: https://suvatsalya.in

## Conditions We Treat

- Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD): https://suvatsalya.in/what-we-treat/autism
- Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD): https://suvatsalya.in/what-we-treat/adhd
- Learning Disabilities (Dyslexia, Dysgraphia, Dyscalculia): https://suvatsalya.in/what-we-treat/learning-disability
- Cerebral Palsy: https://suvatsalya.in/what-we-treat/cerebral-palsy
- Down Syndrome: https://suvatsalya.in/what-we-treat/down-syndrome
- Global Developmental Delay (GDD): https://suvatsalya.in/what-we-treat/gdd

## Therapies We Provide

- Speech and Language Therapy: https://suvatsalya.in/therapies/speech-therapy
- Occupational Therapy: https://suvatsalya.in/therapies/occupational-therapy
- ABA (Applied Behavior Analysis) Therapy: https://suvatsalya.in/therapies/aba-therapy
- Physiotherapy: https://suvatsalya.in/therapies/physiotherapy
- Psychological Assessments: https://suvatsalya.in/therapies/psychological-tests
- Special Education: https://suvatsalya.in/therapies/special-education

## Key Team Members

- Mr. Sharad Shukla — Director & Founder, M.A. in Clinical Psychology, Diploma in Special Education (RCI Regi.)
- Dr. Swati Chhabra — Developmental Paediatrician, MBBS, Diploma in Child Health (DCH), Post Graduate Diploma in Developmental Paediatrics (PGDDN)
- Ms. Tanushree Bhargava — Advisor, Clinical Psychology (RCI Licensed), M.Phil Clinical Psychology
- Dr. Gagan Deep Chhabra — Advisor, Operations, MBBS, DNB (Medicine), DNB (Nephrology)
- Mr. Vinay Jain — Advisor, Technology & Operations, BCA, MCA

## Approach

We offer effective, evidence-based, multidisciplinary therapies and individualised educational programs (IEPs) for issues including ADHD, Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Down Syndrome, Global Developmental Delay and other developmental disorders under one roof. We use a personal approach with individually tailored treatment targeting the real root of neurodevelopmental delay and its associated learning difficulties.
